economic_notes: Consolidated entities include Fisherman's Pride Inc., Lennox Island Development Corporation, and Minigoo Fisheries Inc. (government business enterprise on modified equity basis). Commercial fisheries revenue of $4,275,887.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023. Minigoo Fisheries Inc. is a government business enterprise accounted for using the modified equity method and appears as a financial asset ($102,596) on the balance sheet rather than being fully consolidated. Two fully consolidated subsidiaries: Fisherman's Pride Inc. and Lennox Island Development Corporation. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($13,164,737) + Health Canada ($5,509,957) + DFO ($820,220) + CMHC ($150,912) = $19,645,826 (approximated). Net debt position of $1,707,685. Province is Prince Edward Island (PE). Remuneration schedules referenced on pages 38-39 but not included in provided images.
